'''T'Bolton''' was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
[[File:RancisisFuneral-Rep76.jpg|thumb|right|300px|The Jedi remember the fallen.]]
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] being, T'Bolton was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], when the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], T'Bolton survived until the final year of war when he was dispatched to the [[Siege of Saleucami/Legends|front lines]] of [[Saleucami/Legends|Saleucami]] under the command of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Oppo Rancisis/Legends|Oppo Rancisis]].<ref name="R76" />

During the fighting there, Jedi T'Bolton was killed in the fighting with the [[Morgukai Shadow Army]]. During the [[Funeral of Oppo Rancisis|funeral]] of Master Rancisis, fellow Jedi [[K'Kruhk]] mourned his fallen comrade, along with the others who had died on the battle field.<ref name="R76" />

==Behind the scenes==
Comic writer [[John Ostrander]] speculated that T'Bolton was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Lorrdian/Legends|Lorrdian]] from [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]] born in [[42 BBY/Legends|42 BBY]].<ref name="jfo">{{JCFCite|url=posts/21973967|board=Literature|thread=Getting to know the EU Jedi (John, Jan, Davide, Randy--feel free to help!)|user=[[John Ostrander|jfostrander]]|date=2005-10-17|time=8:43 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20180622020335/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/getting-to-know-the-eu-jedi-john-jan-davide-randy-feel-free-to-help.21960714}}</ref>
